curriculum_title: BBF Lab 90-Day Language Mastery: 20-Lesson Pimsleur-Style Portuguese Audio Series

methodology_spec.verbal_pacing: Pimsleur-style interactive loop (Prompt -> Pause -> Target -> Pause -> Repeat)

lessons.title: First Encounters & Standard Greetings
lessons.description: Learn basic introductions, standard greetings, and how to identify your country of origin in Brazilian Portuguese.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to Session 1 of the BBF Lab Portuguese Audio Series. Today we learn how to greet someone and exchange names. Listen to this conversation in Portuguese.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Bom dia! Qual é o seu nome?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Meu nome é Francisca. E você?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Eu sou o Antonio. Você é americana?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Sim, eu sou americana. E você?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's begin by learning 'Good morning'. Listen closely.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now, let's practice the word 'dia'. Repeat after the speaker, keeping the sound clean.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now, say 'good', which is 'bom'. Listen and repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now try to put them together. Say: Good morning.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now let's learn how to say 'Hello'. Listen and repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: How do you say: Good morning?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Excellent. Now let's learn the question 'What is your name?'. Listen first.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now 'Qual é o seu nome?' (What is your name?). Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: To say 'My name is...', you say 'Meu nome é...'. Listen and repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: How do you say: My name is Akeem?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Ask someone: What is your name?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn nationality. To ask 'Are you American?', you say 'Você é americano?' if speaking to a male, or 'Você é americana?' if speaking to a female. Let's try 'americano'. Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: To say 'No', you say 'Não'. Listen and repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Say: No, I am not American.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now let's practice speaking and responding actively. Imagine Francisca asks you: Qual é o seu nome? Tell her your name is Akeem.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now ask her if she is American.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Listen to her response: Sim, eu sou americana. Now say: Hello, good morning Francisca.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Excellent! That concludes Lesson 1. Review this session until you can speak without hesitation.

lessons.title: Simple Connections & Gym Greetings
lessons.description: Establish basic gym interactions, ask training partners how they are, and learn key locational phrases.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to Lesson 2. Today, we step onto the gym floor and learn how to check in with our training partners. Listen to this conversation.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Tudo ótimo. Onde fica a água?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn how to ask 'How are you?' in a friendly, local way. Listen to 'Tudo bem?'.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: To reply 'I'm good, and you?', you say 'Tudo bem, e você?'. Let's practice 'e você?' (and you?).

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: How do you say: I'm good, and you?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: How do you ask: How are you?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now, let's learn how to ask where the water is located. Listen to 'Onde fica a água?'.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Put it all together: Where is the water?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: The answer is 'Ali' (Over there). Listen and repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: How do you say: Over there?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: How do you ask: Where is the water?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now, let's ask our partner if they want to train. 'Let's train?' in Portuguese is 'Vamos treinar?'. Listen and repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Respond with an excited: Let's go! (Vamos!).

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's review Lesson 1. How do you say: Good morning?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: How do you say: My name is Akeem?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now tell your training partner: Hello, everything good?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Great! Review this workout connection sequence.

lessons.title: Finding Your Way
lessons.description: Master navigation, blocks, directions (left, right, straight), and street addresses in Rio or São Paulo.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to Lesson 3. Today we learn how to navigate the local streets to find the gym. Listen to this conversation.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Por favor, onde fica a academia?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Vire à esquerda na rua Copacabana.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn 'Go straight' (Siga reto). Repeat after the native speaker.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now, let's learn how to turn left. Say 'Vire à esquerda'.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now, let's learn how to turn right. Say 'Vire à direita'.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Say: Go straight, and then turn left.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Siga reto, e depois vire à esquerda.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: How do you say: Turn right?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's practice the word 'block', which is 'quarteirão'. Listen and repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now say 'two blocks' (dois quarteirões). Listen and repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now ask: Where is the water?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now say: Go straight for two blocks, then turn left.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Siga reto por dois quarteirões, e depois vire à esquerda.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Excellent navigation practice. Keep reviewing these directions.

lessons.title: Fueling Up — Café & Shakes
lessons.description: Order coffee, standard drinks, understand protein supplementation, and navigate ordering in a café or juice bar.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to Lesson 4. Today we are fueling up our bodies. We will learn how to order at a café or local juice bar. Listen to this interaction.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Bom dia. Um café e uma água, por favor.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Sem açúcar, por favor. E um shake com proteína.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's order coffee. Say 'A coffee, please'.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now, let's learn how to say 'With protein'. Listen and repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Say: A water and a protein shake, please.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Uma água e um shake com proteína, por favor.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now ask: How much is it?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Respond with: Thank you (if you are male, say obrigado; if female, say obrigada).

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's practice the phrase 'without sugar' which is 'sem açúcar'. Listen and repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now order: A coffee without sugar, please.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Um café sem açúcar, por favor.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: How do you ask: How are you?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Great! Practice ordering your drinks regularly.

lessons.title: Shopping & Market Haggling
lessons.description: Master basic market negotiations, numbers 1-10, currency units, and financial transactions.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to Lesson 5. Today we learn how to handle open-market negotiations and understand numbers up to ten. Listen only.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Nossa! Está muito caro. Faz por cinco reais?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Tudo bem, faça dois por sete reais.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's practice the objection 'It is too expensive'. Listen and repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now let's count. Say 'One, Two' (Um, Dois).

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now negotiate: Can you make it for five reais?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn the word for 'Reais', which is 'reais'. Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now say: No, it is too expensive.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now ask: How much is it?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Great job! Keep negotiating with confidence.

lessons.title: Telling Time & Daily Routines
lessons.description: Understand times of day, state schedules, monitor the intermittent fasting window, and say numbers up to 30.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to Lesson 6. Today we align our routines and master asking for the time, coordinate fasting schedules, and practice numbers up to thirty.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: São oito horas da manhã. Por quê?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Preciso quebrar o meu jejum às nove horas.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Perfeito. Nosso treino é às dez.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's ask: What time is it? Listen and repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Say 'It is eight o'clock' (São oito horas).

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now put it together: I need to break my fast at nine o'clock.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Preciso quebrar o meu jejum às nove horas.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Excellent! Keep managing your time and fasting routines in Portuguese.

lessons.title: Gym Directions & Muscle Anatomy
lessons.description: Describe muscle groups, identify anatomical targets, and express physical sensations or injury/muscle pain areas.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to Lesson 7. Today we map out body anatomy and discuss physical strain or injury target points. Listen only.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: O que nós vamos treinar hoje?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Hoje é treino de pernas e peito.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Perfeito, minhas costas estão doendo um pouco.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Sem problemas. Vamos focar nos membros inferiores.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn the word for 'Chest' (Peito). Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: To say 'It hurts' or 'It is aching', you say 'Está doendo'. Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now let's learn the word for 'shoulders' (ombros). Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: How do you ask: What time is it?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Excellent body mapping practice today. Keep up the high focus!

lessons.title: Organizing the Workout
lessons.description: Learn weight increments, barbell metrics, and active training commands such as push, pull, and lift.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to Lesson 8. Today we learn how to command training structures, adjust plate setups, and instruct movements. Listen only.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Coloque mais peso na barra, por favor.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Mais dez quilos de cada lado. Agora, empurre forte!

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Say: Put more weight on the barbell.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now let's practice the word for 'plates' or 'weights' which is 'anilhas'. Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Say: Where are the plates? (Onde estão as anilhas?).

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Great! Use these active training commands on the gym floor.

lessons.title: Social Connections & Post-Workout Chat
lessons.description: Engage in friendly post-workout conversations, check in on progression targets, and arrange subsequent sessions.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to Lesson 9. Today we learn how to build solid connections after our workouts, congratulate partners, and arrange the next schedule. Listen only.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Com certeza, você treinou muito bem. Nos vemos amanhã?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Sim, amanhã no mesmo horário. Até logo!

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's practice 'same time' which is 'mesmo horário'. Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Say: Tomorrow at the same time.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Excellent! You are building true connections.

lessons.title: Street & Cultural Integration
lessons.description: Consolidate navigational, nutritional, and physical coaching dialogs for complete immersive capability.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to our final Lesson 10. Today we integrate greetings, directions, food ordering, and fitness protocols into unified cultural confidence. Listen only.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Olá! Agora eu falo português brasileiro!

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Que maravilha! Vamos juntos comemorar na churrascaria?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Vamos juntos! Eu pago o café.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Excelente, você é um ótimo parceiro de treino!

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's declare your accomplishment. Say 'I speak Portuguese' (Eu falo português).

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's practice 'I pay' which is 'Eu pago'. Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now say: I pay for the coffee.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Congratulations on completing the first half of the BBF Lab 90-Day Mastery Portuguese Series. Keep refining, training, and manifesting your goals!

lessons.title: Around the House & Daily Life
lessons.description: Learn home vocabulary, rooms of the house, household appliances, and discuss family living environments in Portuguese.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to Lesson 11. Today we shift our focus to daily life around the house. We will learn names for various rooms and items, and talk about family spaces. Listen to this conversation.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Bem-vindo à minha casa! É muito espaçosa.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: A cozinha fica ali. Temos uma mesa grande e uma geladeira nova.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Excelente! E onde estão os quartos?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Os quartos ficam lá em cima. Eu tenho quatro filhos, então a casa está sempre cheia.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn the word for 'House' (Casa). Listen and repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn 'Kitchen' (Cozinha). Repeat after the speaker.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Say: The water is in the fridge.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now let's practice telling someone that you have four children. 'Four children' is 'quatro filhos'. Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Excellent! Review this house setup and family dialogue.

lessons.title: Ordering Food & Restaurant Dining
lessons.description: Learn to order customized meals at Italian and Japanese establishments, ask for the bill, and express dining preferences.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to Lesson 12. Today we dine out. We will learn how to order customized food like a large pizza or a hot teriyaki bowl, and ask for the bill. Listen to this interaction.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Sim! Eu gostaria de uma pizza grande customizada, por favor.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Para mim, uma tigela de teriyaki de carne, com bastante proteína.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Uma cerveja e uma água, por favor.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Obrigado! E depois, a conta por favor.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn how to order a customized pizza. Listen and repeat 'pizza customizada'.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now say 'a large customized pizza' (uma pizza grande customizada).

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn 'teriyaki bowl' (tigela de teriyaki). Repeat after the speaker.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Say 'beef teriyaki bowl' (tigela de teriyaki de carne).

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Say 'chicken teriyaki bowl' (tigela de teriyaki de frango).

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now let's learn how to ask for the bill. In Portuguese, we say 'A conta, por favor'. Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now let's review Lesson 11. How do you say: I have four children?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Excellent! You are ready to enjoy a great meal and converse in Portuguese.

lessons.title: Getting Around & Smart Vehicles
lessons.description: Master navigation inside an electric vehicle, locate a charging station, check charge status, and give street directions.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to Lesson 13. Today we jump in the driver's seat of our electric vehicle and learn how to navigate, charge, and manage road trips in Portuguese. Listen only.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Este carro elétrico é sensacional! É muito rápido.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Sim, é fantástico! Onde fica a próxima estação de recarga?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Eu vou checar no GPS. Fica a dois quarteirões daqui.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Perfeito, precisamos carregar a bateria antes do nosso treino.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Sim! Eu adoro dirigir este carro elétrico.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn the word for 'Car' (Carro). Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn 'Charging station' (Estação de recarga). Listen and repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Onde fica a estação de recarga?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn 'To drive' (Dirigir). Repeat after the speaker.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Say 'I love to drive' (Eu adoro dirigir).

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now say: Go straight, and turn right.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Siga reto, e vire à direita.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Review Lesson 12. How do you say: A coffee and a water, please?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Um café e uma água, por favor.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Great! Enjoy driving and charging your vehicle with local confidence.

lessons.title: Family, Schedule & Work-Life Balance
lessons.description: Discuss daily work shifts, family priorities with four kids, and establish balancing schedules in Portuguese.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to Lesson 14. Today we speak about managing family and work schedules, coordinating long work shifts, and organizing busy days with four kids. Listen closely.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Como foi o seu dia hoje?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Foi muito ocupado. Eu trabalhei em um turno de doze horas.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Sim, estou muito cansado, mas agora vou brincar com meus quatro filhos.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Que maravilhoso! Você é muito dedicado à sua família.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Obrigado! Minha família é minha prioridade.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Say 'a twelve-hour shift' (um turno de doze horas).

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now let's learn the word for 'Tired' (Cansado). Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Say: I am tired (if you are male, say 'Estou cansado'; if female, say 'Estou cansada').

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn 'Busy' (Ocupado). Repeat after the speaker.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Say: I have four kids and a busy schedule.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Eu tenho quatro filhos e um horário ocupado.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: How do you ask: What time is it?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Excellent practice! Keep up the incredible balance between work and family life.

lessons.title: Hobbies & Card Collecting
lessons.description: Discuss sports hobbies, sports trading card collecting, analyzing cards' values, and negotiating trades.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to Lesson 15. Today we speak about leisure activities, sports, and trading cards. We will learn how to describe card collections and negotiate valuations. Listen only.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Veja esta minha coleção de cards de esportes!

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Nossa, que impressionante! Este card é muito raro?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Sim! É um card de futebol americano muito raro e valioso.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Qual é o valor dele no mercado atual?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Vale mais de quinhentos reais! É excelente para colecionadores.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn the word for 'Collection' (Coleção). Repeat after the speaker.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn 'Card' (Card, similar to English or 'cartão'). In Brazil, collectors often say 'card'. Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn the word for 'Value' (Valor). Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Say 'It is very rare' (É muito raro).

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now say: My collection is very valuable.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Excellent! Talk about your sports hobbies with pride.

lessons.title: Buying Groceries & Protein Preparation
lessons.description: Master supermarket terms, choose healthy foods like Greek yogurt and egg whites, and talk about meeting daily macro targets.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to Lesson 16. Today we learn how to shop at a supermarket, select nutrient-dense food, and discuss protein sources and calorie targets in Portuguese. Listen only.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Bom dia! Eu preciso ir ao supermercado hoje comprar mantimentos.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Excelente! O que você precisa comprar?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Preciso de claras de ovo, iogurte grego e algumas barras de proteína.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Perfeito para a sua dieta. Quantas calorias você consome por dia?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Minha meta diária é de duas mil e oitocentas calorias.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Incrível! Vamos comprar tudo o que você precisa.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn the word for 'Supermarket' (Supermercado). Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn 'Protein bar' (Barra de proteína). Repeat after the speaker.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn 'Egg whites' (Claras de ovo). Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: To state 'Two thousand and eight hundred calories', say: Duas mil e oitocentas calorias. Listen and repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Minha meta é duas mil e oitocentas calorias.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now say 'Oikos yogurt' in Portuguese (Iogurte Oikos). Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Great shopping practice today. Focus on your nutritional vocabulary!

lessons.title: Time Management & Fasting Window
lessons.description: Coordinate weekly agendas, schedule workout sessions with clients, and manage the intermittent fasting window in Portuguese.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to Lesson 17. Today we master scheduling, weekly planning, and aligning our intermittent fasting schedule using the 16/8 model. Listen only.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Como está o seu calendário para esta semana?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Está bem cheio! Tenho reuniões de segunda a sexta-feira.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: E qual é o horário do seu jejum intermitente?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Eu faço o jejum dezesseis por oito. Começo às oito da noite e quebro o jejum ao meio-dia.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Muito bem. E o nosso treino com os clientes?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Está agendado para as duas horas da tarde. Perfeito para a minha rotina.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn 'Meeting' (Reunião). Repeat after the speaker.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's say '16/8 Fast' (Jejum dezesseis por oito). Listen and repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Eu faço o jejum dezesseis por oito.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now let's practice 'Monday to Friday' (de segunda a sexta-feira). Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Great schedule coordinating! Keep aligning your daily windows.

lessons.title: Technology & Business Building
lessons.description: Speak about app development, launching software, writing code, and establishing business milestones in Portuguese.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to Lesson 18. Today we dive into technology and software. We will learn how to discuss app development, writing code, and launching software to production. Listen only.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Estamos prontos para o lançamento do nosso novo aplicativo!

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Que maravilhoso! O código está completely pronto?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Sim, os desenvolvedores finalizaram tudo. Está em produção.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Excelente! Qual é o foco principal do aplicativo?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: É um mecanismo inteligente para ajudar na saúde e no treino.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Sensacional! Vai ser um grande sucesso para a sua empresa!

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn the word for 'Company' or 'Business' (Empresa). Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn 'Code' (Código). Repeat after the speaker.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Say: The code is in production.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Excellent work! Talk about your tech business with local vocabulary.

lessons.title: Training Clients & Verbal Coaching
lessons.description: Deliver actionable coaching cues, guide training clients, and provide professional training motivation without injury risk.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to Lesson 19. Today we learn how to verbally coach clients and training partners on the gym floor, delivering safe, highly motivating verbal instructions in Portuguese. Listen only.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Olá Ana! Pronta para treinar forte hoje?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Olá! Sim, sou sua cliente número um. Qual é o plano?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Vamos focar no supino com halteres e depois no leg press.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Perfeito. Nada de agachamento com barra hoje?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Não, hoje o foco é total nas máquinas e halteres. Mantenha o foco!

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn the word for 'Client' (Cliente). Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's learn 'Dumbbell' (Halter). Repeat after the speaker.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Say to your client: Keep your focus! (Mantenha o foco!).

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Superb coaching! You are delivering real value.

lessons.title: Full Immersive Conversation
lessons.description: Participate in a fluid, high-level Brazilian Portuguese dialogue blending all aspects of family, business, transport, and nutrition.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to Lesson 20! Today we integrate everything we have learned—family, gym cues, electric vehicles, technology, business, and eating out—into one fluent conversation. Listen closely.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Olá meu amigo! Como estão as coisas com o aplicativo?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Olá! Tudo ótimo! O aplicativo está em produção e já é um grande sucesso da nossa empresa.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Que maravilhoso! E como está a sua rotina com quatro filhos?

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Muito ocupada, mas sempre temos tempo para a família e para treinar forte.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Excelente! Vamos comemorar hoje? Eu adoraria comer uma pizza grande customizada.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Sim! Excelente ideia! But antes, preciso carregar o meu carro elétrico ali na estação de recarga.

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_female
dialogue_flow.text: Perfeito, nós vamos juntos. Eu pago o café e você paga a pizza!

dialogue_flow.speaker: pt_native_male
dialogue_flow.text: Fechado! Vamos juntos comemorar o sucesso!

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Let's practice the word for 'Success' (Sucesso). Repeat.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now say: We go together. (Nós vamos juntos).

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Congratulations on completing the entire BBF Lab 20-Lesson Portuguese Audio Series! You have built real conversational competency and integrated it fully. Parabéns!
